protocols.Paper_title: Inactivation of Coronaviruses during Sample Preparation for Proteomics Experiments
protocols.Evidence: Proteomics lysis buffers included SDS; lysis was performed at room temperature.

protocols.Paper_title: Inactivation of Coronaviruses during Sample Preparation for Proteomics Experiments
protocols.Evidence: Combining these lysis buffers with heating results in complete inactivation.

protocols.Paper_title: Inactivation of Coronaviruses during Sample Preparation for Proteomics Experiments
protocols.Evidence: Proteomics lysis buffers included sodium deoxycholate; lysis was performed at room temperature.

protocols.Paper_title: Inactivation of Coronaviruses during Sample Preparation for Proteomics Experiments
protocols.Evidence: Combining these lysis buffers with heating results in complete inactivation.

protocols.Evidence: Combining these lysis buffers with heating results in complete inactivation.

protocols.Paper_title: Inactivation of Coronaviruses during Sample Preparation for Proteomics Experiments
protocols.Evidence: Proteomics lysis buffers included urea; lysis was performed at room temperature.

protocols.Paper_title: Inactivation of Coronaviruses during Sample Preparation for Proteomics Experiments
protocols.Evidence: As a control, heat inactivation without lysis buffer was performed.

protocols.Paper_title: Inactivation of Coronaviruses during Sample Preparation for Proteomics Experiments
protocols.Evidence: RNA extraction was performed with the QIAamp Viral RNA Mini Kit; real-time PCR was performed.
